title: Mandangad fort
tagline: Mandangad fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Mandangad Fort (also called Chitradurga Fort) is about 2 km from Mandangad town in Ratnagiri District, Maharashtra.
overview.description: Mandangad Fort (also called Chitradurga Fort) is about 2 km from Mandangad town in Ratnagiri District, Maharashtra. This fort is said to be constructed by King Bhoj. After the Mughals lost the Battle of Umberkhind, This fort was captured by Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj in the battle with Adil Shah. A 400-year-old cannon is the major feature of the fort.

topPlaces.name: Aade
topPlaces.description: Aade (or Ade) is very small village in Dapoli Taluka and Ratnagiri district of Maharashtra, India. It is well connected and exactly in between Kelshi and Anjarle.

topPlaces.name: Mandangad
topPlaces.description: Mandangad (or Mandangadh or Mandangarh) is the headquarters of Mandangad taluka the northmost taluka in Ratnagiri district of Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Adkhal
topPlaces.description: Adkhal is a small village in the Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 563 residents in the village.

topPlaces.name: Devhare
topPlaces.description: Devhare is a village in Mandangad taluka in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra, India, about 210 km from Mumbai by road. All state transport buses go through Devhare.

Devhare is a village in Mandangad taluka in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra, India, about 210 km from Mumbai by road. All state transport buses go through Devhare.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mandangad fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mandangad fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mandangad fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (98 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (90 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mandangad fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mandangad fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mandangad fort?
faq.a: Stays in Mandangad fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mandangad fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Aade, Mandangad, Adkhal, Ambadawe, Devhare.
